Lancaster Avenue corridor reconstruction status call.
Transportation Planning opened the review for permit application permit:lancaster-reconstruction-001 inside corridor zone corridor-zone:lancaster-main.
The organization record for Transportation Planning remained the responsible office.
The decision record moved to approval after staff confirmed the reconstruction phasing package.
Field services scheduled inspection:lancaster-site-visit-001 for the next morning.
The inspector later reported the trench plates, signage, and detour controls passed review.
The lane occupation authority grant was activated after the inspection pass.
Staff issued the corridor reconstruction permit and kept a weekly public notice obligation active for nearby businesses.
